user.title: Paste the profile code
user.description: Create and copy a profile code from the SmartIR converter website, then paste it below.

data_description.profile_code: A code beginning with IRP1: generated locally by the converter website.

device.title: Set up the climate entity
device.description: Choose the Infrared emitter that controls this device. Optionally choose a receiver to keep the entity synchronized when the physical remote is used.

reconfigure.title: Update SmartIR Native device
reconfigure.description: Change the name, emitter, or optional receiver. Removing the receiver keeps normal transmit-only operation.

error.invalid_profile: The profile code is invalid or unsupported. Generate it again and paste the complete code.

abort.no_infrared_emitters: No Home Assistant Infrared emitter entity is available.
abort.invalid_profile: The profile setup session expired. Start adding the integration again.
abort.reconfigure_successful: The SmartIR Native device was updated successfully.

init.title: Edit Infrared entities
init.description: Change the emitter or optional receiver used by this climate entity. Leave the receiver empty for transmit-only operation.
